iotfleetwise.vehicle.CfnAbout:
Creates a vehicle, which is an instance of a vehicle model (model manifest). Vehicles created from the same vehicle model consist of the same signals inherited from the vehicle model.

**Note**  
 If you have an existing AWS IoT thing, you can use AWS IoT FleetWise to create a vehicle and collect data from your thing. 

For more information, see [Create a vehicle (console)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-fleetwise/latest/developerguide/create-vehicle-console.html) in the *AWS IoT FleetWise Developer Guide*.

iotfleetwise.vehicle.AssociationBehavior.Description: (Optional) An option to create a new AWS IoT thing when creating a vehicle, or to validate an existing thing as a vehicle.

iotfleetwise.vehicle.Attributes.Description: (Optional) Static information about a vehicle in a key-value pair. For example: `"engine Type"` : `"v6"`

iotfleetwise.vehicle.DecoderManifestArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of a decoder manifest associated with the vehicle to create.

iotfleetwise.vehicle.ModelManifestArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the vehicle model (model manifest) to create the vehicle from.

iotfleetwise.vehicle.Name.Description: The unique ID of the vehicle.

iotfleetwise.vehicle.Tags.Description: (Optional) Metadata which can be used to manage the vehicle.
